Manage telemetry sources and collectors
Manage telemetry dashboards
Manage telemetry alert rules

Better Stack is a comprehensive infrastructure monitoring and observability platform combining uptime monitoring, log management, incident management, and status pages. The API covers both the Uptime (on-call, monitors, heartbeats, status pages) and Telemetry (logs, metrics, sources, dashboards, alerts) product areas.

Contact Support:
